promotions.title: SGD 200 Cashback Welcome Bonus
promotions.description: Get SGD 200 cashback rebate when you spend at least SGD 500 per month for the first 3 months after card approval.
promotions.conditions: New to UOB credit cards only. First principal cardholder only. Cashback credited within 2 months of meeting the spend requirement.

promotions.title: Apple AirPods 4 or SGD 200 Cash
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver and choose between Apple AirPods 4 (worth SGD 229) or SGD 200 cash when you spend SGD 500 per month for 2 consecutive months.
promotions.bonusDescription: Apple AirPods 4 (worth SGD 229) or SGD 200 cash
promotions.conditions: New to UOB credit cards. Must apply via SingSaver link. Principal cardholders only. Gift fulfilled by SingSaver within 10 weeks of meeting spend requirement.

promotions.title: 20,000 Bonus KrisFlyer Miles
promotions.description: Earn 20,000 bonus KrisFlyer miles when you spend SGD 1,500 within 3 months of card approval. Miles credited to your KrisFlyer account within 2 months of qualifying.
promotions.conditions: New to UOB credit cards. First principal cardholder only. Local and overseas spend qualifies.

promotions.title: Samsonite Spinner 75cm or 20,000 Miles
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver and choose Samsonite C-Lite Spinner 75cm luggage (worth SGD 680) or 20,000 KrisFlyer miles when you spend SGD 800 within 2 months of approval.
promotions.bonusDescription: Samsonite C-Lite Spinner 75cm (worth SGD 680) or 20,000 miles
promotions.conditions: New to UOB credit cards. Must apply via SingSaver link. Gift shipped within 12 weeks. Cannot be combined with bank's own welcome offer.

promotions.title: 20,000 Bonus Miles + Fee Waiver
promotions.description: Apply via MileLion's referral link for 20,000 bonus miles with first year annual fee waiver when you spend SGD 800 within 2 months.
promotions.bonusDescription: 20,000 bonus KrisFlyer miles + first year fee waiver
promotions.conditions: New to UOB credit cards. Apply via MileLion referral link. Annual fee of SGD 261.20 waived for year 1.

promotions.title: 15,000 Bonus Miles
promotions.description: Earn 15,000 bonus DBS Points (equivalent to 30,000 miles) when you spend SGD 800 within the first 3 months of card approval.
promotions.conditions: New to DBS/POSB credit cards. First principal cardholder only. DBS Points converted at 1 DBS Point = 2 miles.

promotions.title: 40,000 Miles or Samsonite Luggage
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for 40,000 bonus miles or Samsonite Spinner 68cm luggage (worth SGD 550) when you spend SGD 800 within the first 2 months.
promotions.bonusDescription: 40,000 bonus miles or Samsonite Spinner 68cm (worth SGD 550)
promotions.conditions: New to DBS/POSB credit cards. Apply via SingSaver link. Gift choice made at time of SingSaver reward redemption.

promotions.title: 35,000 Bonus Miles
promotions.description: Apply via MileLion for 35,000 bonus miles (17,500 DBS Points) when you spend SGD 800 in the first 2 months.
promotions.conditions: New to DBS/POSB credit cards. Must click through MileLion referral link before applying.

promotions.title: 30,000 Bonus Citi Miles
promotions.description: Earn 30,000 bonus Citi Miles when you spend SGD 1,500 within the first 3 months of card approval. Miles credited to your account within 3 billing cycles.
promotions.conditions: New to Citi credit cards only. First principal cardholder only. Citi Miles transferable to KrisFlyer, Cathay Asia Miles, and other partners at 1:1.

promotions.title: 30,000 Miles + Fee Waiver or Samsonite
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for 30,000 bonus miles with first year fee waiver, or choose Samsonite C-Lite Expandable 75cm luggage (worth SGD 680) instead.
promotions.bonusDescription: Samsonite C-Lite 75cm (worth SGD 680) or 30,000 miles + fee waiver
promotions.conditions: New to Citi credit cards. Apply via SingSaver. Fee waiver applies to annual fee of SGD 196.20 in year 1 when choosing miles option.

promotions.title: 20,000 Bonus Air Miles
promotions.description: Earn 20,000 bonus air miles when you spend SGD 500 within the first month of card approval. Miles credited within 2 months of qualifying spend.
promotions.conditions: New to HSBC credit cards. First principal cardholder only. Miles earned as HSBC Points convertible to major airline partners.

promotions.title: Apple AirPods Pro or 25,000 Miles
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver and choose Apple AirPods Pro 2nd Gen (worth SGD 349) or 25,000 bonus miles when you spend SGD 500 within the first 2 months.
promotions.bonusDescription: Apple AirPods Pro 2nd Gen (worth SGD 349) or 25,000 miles
promotions.conditions: New to HSBC credit cards. Apply via SingSaver link only. Gift fulfilled by SingSaver within 10 weeks.

promotions.title: SGD 150 Cash Credit
promotions.description: Get SGD 150 cash credit when you spend SGD 300 within the first 2 months of card approval. Credited to your statement within 3 months of qualifying.
promotions.conditions: New to HSBC credit cards. First principal cardholder only.

promotions.title: JBL Flip 7 Speaker or SGD 180 Cash
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for JBL Flip 7 Bluetooth Speaker (worth SGD 199) or SGD 180 cash when you spend SGD 300 within the first month.
promotions.bonusDescription: JBL Flip 7 Speaker (worth SGD 199) or SGD 180 cash
promotions.conditions: New to HSBC credit cards. Must apply via SingSaver link. Gift or cash credited within 10 weeks of meeting spend.

promotions.title: 10,000 Bonus Travel$ (Miles)
promotions.description: Earn 10,000 bonus Travel$ (equivalent to 10,000 miles) when you spend SGD 800 within the first 3 months of card approval.
promotions.conditions: New to OCBC credit cards. Travel$ convertible to KrisFlyer, Asia Miles, and other partners at 1:1.

promotions.title: 15,000 Bonus Miles or Nintendo Switch
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for 15,000 bonus miles or a Nintendo Switch Lite (worth SGD 289) when you spend SGD 800 in the first 2 months.
promotions.bonusDescription: Nintendo Switch Lite (worth SGD 289) or 15,000 miles
promotions.conditions: New to OCBC credit cards. Apply via SingSaver. Gift colour subject to availability.

promotions.title: SGD 200 Cashback Welcome
promotions.description: Get SGD 200 cashback when you spend SGD 500 within the first 2 months of card approval.
promotions.conditions: New to OCBC credit cards. First principal cardholder only. Credited to statement within 2 months of qualifying.

promotions.title: Dyson AM07 Fan or SGD 200 Cash
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for a Dyson AM07 Cool Tower Fan (worth SGD 449) or SGD 200 cash when you spend SGD 500 in the first 2 months.
promotions.bonusDescription: Dyson AM07 Fan (worth SGD 449) or SGD 200 cash
promotions.conditions: New to OCBC credit cards. Apply via SingSaver link. Gift fulfilled within 12 weeks of meeting spend requirement.

promotions.title: 20,000 Bonus Miles
promotions.description: Earn 20,000 bonus miles when you spend SGD 500 within the first 2 months of card approval. Miles credited as 360° Rewards Points transferable to airline partners.
promotions.conditions: New to Standard Chartered credit cards. First principal cardholder only. 360° Rewards Points transferable to KrisFlyer and other partners.

promotions.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones or 20,000 Miles
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for Sony WH-1000XM5 noise-cancelling headphones (worth SGD 499) or 20,000 bonus miles when you spend SGD 500 within the first month.
promotions.bonusDescription: Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones (worth SGD 499) or 20,000 miles
promotions.conditions: New to Standard Chartered credit cards. Apply via SingSaver link. Headphones colour subject to availability.

promotions.title: SGD 200 Cashback
promotions.description: Get SGD 200 cashback when you apply via SingSaver and spend SGD 500 within the first month of card approval.
promotions.conditions: New to Standard Chartered credit cards. Apply via SingSaver link.

promotions.title: SGD 200 Cashback Bonus
promotions.description: Earn SGD 200 cashback when you spend SGD 800 within the first 2 months of card approval. Cashback credited to your statement within 3 billing cycles.
promotions.conditions: New to Citi credit cards. First principal cardholder only.

promotions.title: Dyson V12 Detect Slim or SGD 200 Cash
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for a Dyson V12 Detect Slim Absolute vacuum (worth SGD 849) or SGD 200 cash when you spend SGD 800 in the first 2 months.
promotions.bonusDescription: Dyson V12 Detect Slim (worth SGD 849) or SGD 200 cash
promotions.conditions: New to Citi credit cards. Apply via SingSaver link. Gift dispatched within 12 weeks of meeting spend requirement.

promotions.title: 5,000 Bonus KrisFlyer Miles
promotions.description: Earn 5,000 bonus KrisFlyer miles when you spend SGD 500 within the first 3 months of card membership. Miles credited directly to your KrisFlyer account.
promotions.conditions: New Amex cardmembers only. First basic card only.

promotions.title: 10,000 Bonus KrisFlyer Miles
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for 10,000 bonus KrisFlyer miles when you spend SGD 500 within the first 2 months of card approval — double the bank's standard offer.
promotions.conditions: New Amex cardmembers. Apply via SingSaver link. Miles credited within 8 weeks of qualifying spend.

promotions.title: 15,000 Bonus KrisFlyer Miles
promotions.description: Earn 15,000 bonus KrisFlyer miles when you spend SGD 1,000 within the first 3 months. Miles credited directly to your KrisFlyer account.
promotions.conditions: New Amex cardmembers only. First basic card only. Card has annual fee of SGD 337.05.

promotions.title: 25,000 Bonus KrisFlyer Miles
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for 25,000 bonus KrisFlyer miles when you spend SGD 1,000 within the first 2 months — significantly more than the bank's standard offer.
promotions.conditions: New Amex cardmembers. Apply via SingSaver link. Card carries annual fee of SGD 337.05.

promotions.title: 3% Cashback for First 6 Months
promotions.description: Enjoy an elevated 3% cashback rate on all eligible spend for the first 6 months of card membership (capped at SGD 5,000 spend per month). Standard rate of 1.5% applies thereafter.
promotions.bonusDescription: 3% cashback (double the usual rate) for first 6 months
promotions.conditions: New Amex cardmembers. Elevated rate applies to first SGD 5,000 per month. Bonus cashback credited monthly.

promotions.title: SGD 150 Cashback
promotions.description: Get SGD 150 cashback when you apply via SingSaver and spend SGD 500 within the first month of card approval.
promotions.conditions: New to DBS/POSB credit cards. Apply via SingSaver link.

promotions.title: 50,000 Bonus Miles + Fee Waiver
promotions.description: Earn 50,000 bonus DBS Points (equivalent to 100,000 miles) with first year annual fee waiver when you spend SGD 3,000 within the first 3 months.
promotions.bonusDescription: 100,000 bonus miles (50,000 DBS Points) + annual fee waiver
promotions.conditions: New to DBS/POSB credit cards. Must hold a DBS account. Annual fee of SGD 594 waived for year 1. Premium card for higher-income earners (min SGD 120,000/year).

promotions.title: 15,000 Bonus VOYAGE Miles
promotions.description: Earn 15,000 bonus VOYAGE Miles when you spend SGD 3,000 within the first 3 months of card membership. VOYAGE Miles transferable to KrisFlyer and Cathay Asia Miles.
promotions.conditions: New to OCBC credit cards. Annual fee of SGD 488 applies. Minimum income SGD 120,000/year.

promotions.title: 15,000 Bonus Miles or Nintendo Switch
promotions.description: Apply via SingSaver for 15,000 bonus miles or a Nintendo Switch Lite (worth SGD 289) when you spend SGD 800 in the first 2 months.
promotions.bonusDescription: Nintendo Switch Lite (worth SGD 289) or 15,000 miles
promotions.conditions: New to OCBC credit cards. Apply via SingSaver link.

promotions.title: 35,000 Bonus Miles + Fee Waiver
promotions.description: Earn 35,000 bonus miles with first year annual fee waiver when you spend SGD 2,000 within the first 3 months of card approval.
promotions.bonusDescription: 35,000 bonus miles + first year fee waiver
promotions.conditions: New to Standard Chartered credit cards. Annual fee of SGD 594 waived in year 1. Minimum income SGD 80,000/year.

promotions.title: 50,000 Membership Rewards Points
promotions.description: Earn 50,000 bonus Membership Rewards points when you spend SGD 5,000 within the first 3 months of card membership. Points transferable to KrisFlyer at 1:0.7.
promotions.conditions: New Amex cardmembers. Annual fee of SGD 1,712 applies. Premium card.

promotions.title: SGD 150 Cashback
promotions.description: Get SGD 150 cashback when you apply via SingSaver and spend SGD 500 within the first 2 months of card approval.
promotions.conditions: New to Maybank credit cards. Apply via SingSaver link.
